segments.text: This creepy skull isn't a Halloween
gimmick. It's a world famous tequila
bottle and it was designed to break the
rules of a massive global tradition. In
most part of the world, death is all
about sadness and crying. But in Mexican
culture, mourning is actually an insult
to the dead people. So they created ga
tequila, a skull bottle built to
celebrate the day of the dead, not fear.
And the name ka, it means one single
word, life. Still, how does a weird
skull design compete with massive
billiondoll global alcohol brands? Every
single bottle a collector's item. Every
skull is hand painted, meaning no two
bottles in the world are exactly the
same. You're not just buying a tequila.
You're buying unique art. Genius design.
Subscribe for more.
